\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
A class for assembling Block Sparse Row (BSR) matrices from mesh data. 

The {\ttfamily \mbox{\hyperlink{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat}{BSRFormat}}} class is designed to construct and manage BSR matrices using mesh connectivity and degree-\/of-\/freedom (DoF) information.

\mbox{\hyperlink{structIn}{In}} 2D, the sparsity is computed based on node-\/face connectivity, while in 3D, node-\/node connectivity is used.

\begin{DoxyNote}{Note}
This class uses \mbox{\hyperlink{namespaceArcane}{Arcane}}\textquotesingle{}s accelerator api and will use GPU is possible. It uses a {\ttfamily \mbox{\hyperlink{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRMatrix}{BSRMatrix}}} under the hood for representation and operations.

This class keep a reference on the instance of Fem\+Do\+FOn\+Nodes used in the constructor. So this instance of Fem\+Do\+FOn\+Nodes must live until the instance of this class is destroyed. 
\end{DoxyNote}


Definition at line 156 of file BSRFormat.\+h.



\doxysubsection{Member Function Documentation}
\mbox{\Hypertarget{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_ab40b83069f7e3687258becfc1f3ca01e}\label{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_ab40b83069f7e3687258becfc1f3ca01e}} 
\index{Arcane::FemUtils::BSRFormat@{Arcane::FemUtils::BSRFormat}!assembleBilinearAtomic@{assembleBilinearAtomic}}
\index{assembleBilinearAtomic@{assembleBilinearAtomic}!Arcane::FemUtils::BSRFormat@{Arcane::FemUtils::BSRFormat}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{assembleBilinearAtomic()}{assembleBilinearAtomic()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily template$<$class Function $>$ \\
void Arcane\+::\+Fem\+Utils\+::\+BSRFormat\+::assemble\+Bilinear\+Atomic (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{Function}]{compute\+\_\+element\+\_\+matrix }\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [inline]}}



Assembles the global BSR matrix for a bilinear operator, cell-\/wise. 

This function constructs the Block Sparse Row (BSR) matrix by iterating over mesh cells and accumulating contributions from element-\/level matrices. It uses a user-\/defined callback to compute the local matrix for each cell and updates the global matrix with atomic operations to ensure parallel safety.\hypertarget{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_autotoc_md31}{}\doxyparagraph{Parameters\+:}\label{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_autotoc_md31}

\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item {\ttfamily compute\+\_\+element\+\_\+matrix}\+: A callback function that computes the local matrix for a given cell. It must return a matrix compatible with the expected block size.
\end{DoxyItemize}\hypertarget{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_autotoc_md32}{}\doxyparagraph{Key Details\+:}\label{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_autotoc_md32}

\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Uses cell-\/to-\/node connectivity from the mesh and DoF mappings for assembly.
\item Employs atomic operations to safely handle concurrent updates in parallel execution.
\item Handles block structure updates for {\ttfamily block\+Size x block\+Size} dimensions. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition at line 391 of file BSRFormat.\+h.

\mbox{\Hypertarget{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_a8d688f9f1a53070ad55129d0e3a32fa8}\label{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_a8d688f9f1a53070ad55129d0e3a32fa8}}

\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{assembleBilinearAtomicFree()}{assembleBilinearAtomicFree()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily template$<$class Function $>$ \\
void Arcane\+::\+Fem\+Utils\+::\+BSRFormat\+::assemble\+Bilinear\+Atomic\+Free (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{Function}]{compute\+\_\+element\+\_\+vectors }\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [inline]}}



Assembles the global BSR matrix for a bilinear operator, node-\/wise. 

This function constructs the Block Sparse Row (BSR) matrix by iterating over mesh nodes and accumulating contributions from element-\/level matrices. It uses a user-\/defined callback to compute the local vectors for each cell and updates the global matrix.\hypertarget{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_autotoc_md33}{}\doxyparagraph{Parameters\+:}\label{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_autotoc_md33}

\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item {\ttfamily compute\+\_\+element\+\_\+vectors}\+: A callback function that computes the local vectors for a given cell. It must return a vectors compatible with the expected block size.
\end{DoxyItemize}\hypertarget{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_autotoc_md34}{}\doxyparagraph{Key Details\+:}\label{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1BSRFormat_autotoc_md34}

\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Uses cell-\/to-\/node, node-\/to-\/cell connectivity from the mesh and DoF mappings for assembly.
\item Handles block structure updates for {\ttfamily block\+Size x block\+Size} dimensions. 
\end{DoxyItemize}
